findings.title: Silent consent-write failure triggers immediate re-consent loop
findings.suggested_fix: When grantConsent fails, do not call options.onRetry(). Show an inline error state instead, or let the modal stay open with an error message.

findings.title: E2E IndexedDB seed missing await on onsuccess — race condition
findings.suggested_fix: Use the shared indexeddb-seed helpers or wrap the IDB write in a Promise and await it before navigating, consistent with test-patterns.md guidance.

findings.title: _purpose destructured but unused in ProviderReconsentModal
findings.suggested_fix: Remove the _purpose parameter from destructuring or document why purpose is accepted in the interface but intentionally unused in the component body.

findings.title: No test for grantConsent write failure path in useProviderReconsent
findings.suggested_fix: Add a test: when grantConsent resolves { success: false }, verify that onRetry is NOT called and the modal remains closed.

findings.title: providerMeta.ts parity with consent-inventory.md not enforced by any test
findings.suggested_fix: Add a parity test that parses the provider IDs from consent-inventory.md and asserts every one has an entry in PROVIDER_META (mirroring the consentParity.test.ts pattern).

residual_risks: embeddingPipeline.ts has isGranted guard but no isGrantedForProvider guard — plan noted this as required but it was deferred to implementation
Existing AI hooks (useChatQA, useTutor, useAISuggestions) have no ProviderReconsentError catch blocks — errors will propagate to generic error handlers
testing_gaps: No test for concurrent ProviderReconsentError handling (two AI calls, two errors)
No test verifying that embeddingPipeline correctly blocks on provider mismatch
